name: manga-test
description: Comprehensive test + benchmark suite for the Manga Creation Workflow & Publishing Management System API

scripts.postman: newman run postman/manga-api.postman_collection.json -e postman/manga.postman_environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-report.html
scripts.test:all: node seed/seed-test-accounts.mjs && node e2e/run-e2e.mjs && npm run postman && npm run bench:autocannon && npm run bench:percentiles
